surfaces.label: Client-safe summary
surfaces.solicitorVisibleText:
CLIENT-SAFE SUMMARY
(not for court or CPS)

We are reviewing the papers for Devon Walsh. This is early-stage — nothing is final until we have full disclosure and your instructions. CCTV still images are on the papers, but the master CCTV footage, full export, and continuity/provenance material are still outstanding. Stills alone do not show the full recording.

[CaseBrain — client-safe summary. Evidence state: provisional. Not for court or CPS use.]

surfaces.label: Do-not-overstate warnings
surfaces.solicitorVisibleText:
• CCTV proves identity
• CCTV proves offence
• positive identification from stills
• Do not treat stills alone as proof of identity or offence.
• Do not state "Full CCTV confirms" — CCTV is not fully served on papers
